ab: izua ku qali a ti kuliw timadju ru maraurau a kemacu ta nemanga.
ch: 我有一個朋友叫kuliw，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named kuliw, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: nu kitulutulu kisedjam ta salasaladja tua sivecivecik siquliqulip kata vavecikan a qadupu.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: nu puita pudrusa putjelu pasedjaman timadju na zuma.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: ljakua izua za inika bulai a kakudanan nimadju ru kisedjam sa ini a nga pacikel.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: nu cuai anga inika nga pasedjam tjaimadju.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: izua ka ita qadaw vaik amen a mapuljat a kivangavang.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: kaidjalan lingau ti kuliw ta sama kaya ljakua na madraudrau a kemacu ta sidjuadjuas.
ch: 路途中，kuliw想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, kuliw wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: kisedjam timadju ta cilikami tua salasaladj ljakua tevelain tjaimadju namaya ken uta a inika na kemacu.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: qemaung ta latjakan ti kuliw madjalw sa ikaikai aqumaya inika ken a nu pasedjaman ta cilikami aya.
ch: kuliw急的哭了出來。他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
en: kuliw burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: pasemalavan na salasaladj timadju, ayatua inika sun a kemacu nu kisedjam sun inika su pacekel!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: katiyau anga tu qadaw na medjama ti kuliw a magakku pacikelen a kinisedjam a nemanga na salasaladj.
ch: 隔天上學，kuliw很早就到學校了，kuliw把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, kuliw arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: kipaqaljai ta salasaladj ti kuliw ikai, ta tjara kemacu anga nu tjaivililj ta nemanga timadju masalu uta ta salasaladj ta na selaing a pasedjam ta nemanga tjaimadju.
ch: kuliw向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: kuliw apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
